title: Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
company: Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates:
Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates!
